Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 605}We're gonna do nothing but share girl talk all night! There's nothing better than that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 605}We were up too late last night talking. I'm so sleepy today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 605}But I got some really good dirt on some people, so it was definitely worth it.[n]{f 1 1}
